method: Static source/import review. routesUsed lists templates or generated-route scope. No client:* directives were found.

components.name: CtaBand
components.purpose: Reusable conversion band before the footer.
components.styles: Scoped component CSS plus global .btn-invert/.rv tokens.
accessibilityConcerns: Default subtitle repeats placeholder phone data.
components.refactorRecommendation: Keep; clarify direct overrides versus BaseLayout hideCta behavior.

components.name: Eyebrow
components.purpose: Decorative section label with optional rules and alignment.
components.styles: Global eyebrow classes with component inline style attributes for size/margin.
accessibilityConcerns: Rules are empty spans and effectively decorative; confirm they remain ignored.
components.refactorRecommendation: Keep; consider CSS custom properties/classes instead of generated inline styles only if the variant set grows.

components.name: Footer
components.purpose: Global footer navigation, contact, social, certification, legal, and copyright content.
components.styles: 517-line component dominated by scoped responsive CSS.
accessibilityConcerns: Generic social fallbacks are announced as business profiles.
components.reusability: Global but content and presentation are tightly coupled.
components.refactorRecommendation: After content verification, split data from markup and optionally extract Brand/Social/Contact primitives; avoid changes solely for line count.

components.name: GuideCard
components.styles: Scoped card CSS; global palette tokens.
accessibilityConcerns: Image lacks intrinsic width/height and responsive sources.
Low-contrast faint/gold metadata should be checked at computed size.
components.refactorRecommendation: Keep; migrate image rendering to an optimized typed image source.

components.name: Header
components.purpose: Sticky brand header, desktop nav/dropdown, mobile drawer, active state, and scroll locking.
components.browserJavaScript: Two hoisted vanilla scripts; included in small per-page JS chunks.
components.styles: Large scoped responsive CSS plus global buttons/tokens.
accessibilityConcerns: all: unset removes default focus styles with no replacement.
Drawer does not trap focus or restore focus to the trigger.
Raw set:html is controlled today but should not accept untrusted content.
components.refactorRecommendation: Split desktop/dropdown/drawer behavior into testable primitives or a small navigation script while preserving one semantic nav data source.

components.name: PageHero
components.purpose: Reusable centered page heading and optional lead.
components.styles: Small scoped CSS plus global heading tokens.

components.name: TopBar
components.purpose: Global phone/email utility bar with optional social links.
accessibilityConcerns: Placeholder phone remains visible as text.
components.refactorRecommendation: Keep; render only verified business contact/social data and share contact presentation rules with Footer.

components.name: BaseLayout
components.purpose: Document shell, metadata, global UI, fonts, and reveal-on-scroll behavior.
components.browserJavaScript: One small hoisted IntersectionObserver reveal script.
components.styles: Imports global CSS; page/component CSS is bundled by Astro.
accessibilityConcerns: Reveal behavior includes a reduced-motion fallback in global CSS.
components.reusability: Single global layout; appropriate for current site size.
components.refactorRecommendation: Keep; add a typed SEO/meta layer, default social image, Twitter tags, and explicit crawler/theme metadata after production facts are confirmed.

hydrationSummary.approach: Static Astro HTML plus hoisted vanilla scripts.
hydrationSummary.recommendation: Do not add framework hydration; current interactions are small enough for scoped vanilla modules. If a future island is introduced, choose the least eager directive supported by the interaction.
